name: clean-no-issues
description: A safe refactor that introduces no secrets, injection vectors, or authz gaps — should pass with no findings.

pr.title: Refactor user profile fetch to use repository pattern
pr.author: maya
pr.description: Moves the raw Prisma calls for user profile reads into a UserRepository class. No new endpoints, no auth changes, purely internal restructuring.

agentResponse.summary: The change is a pure internal refactor moving Prisma calls into a repository class. No secrets, injection vectors, missing auth guards, or unsafe patterns were found.
